name: EZ Groom EZ Dry III High Velocity Dog & Cat Dryer
description: For the ultimate blow dry experience, the EZ Dry III High Velocity Dog & Cat Dryer has you covered. Ultra-powerful, this high velocity dryer is incredibly quiet, lightweight and cuts your drying time in half—a game changer for skittish pets! Featuring dual motors, it’s a professional strength tool that you can use from the comfort of your home. Choose your speed, wrangle your pet and she’ll be coiffed and stylin’ in no time!
